SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2022 BY HAROLD E. KAHN. PLAINTIFF JUNJIE LIN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONAL COURT INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. INTERPERTERS OATH IS ON FILE. DEFENDANTS PV HOLDING CORP. AND AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC., REPRESENTED BY MARILYN NOMURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHAMPION CLEANING SPECIALISTS INC. REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN CRUZ IS PRESENT THROUGH ZOOM. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANTS REPRESENTATIVE MARILYN NOMURA TO RELEASE THE NAME, DRIVERS LICENSE AND CONTACT INFORMATION THAT SHE HAS FOR THE HIT AND RUN DRIVER TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION CLEANING SPECIALISTS INC. IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. PV HOLDING CORP. AND AVIS RENT A CAR DOES NOT OWE JUNJIE LIN ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-08-2022. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. (503)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 12-2-22)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JUNJIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PV HOLDING CORP. AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,600.00, DEFENDANT PV HOLDING CORP AND AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF JUNJIE LIN $4,600.00, ALL PRINCIPLE WITH NO INTEREST OR COSTS. DEFENDNAT CHAMPION CLEANING SPECIALISTS, INC. SHALL PAY 0.00 TO PLAINTIFF. (SEE ATTACHED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
